Mock Interviewer
30+ job roles · 15 questions · 1:00 min each · Live AI suggestions + authenticity engine
Interview Type
Choose a Job Role
Full Stack Developer
Question 1 of 15 · 1:00 per question
HR
AI Interviewer · 1:00Q1/15
Tell me about a full-stack project you've built. What technology choices did you make and why?
Live Suggestions (private) Your own words
STAR Structure
Situation → Task → Action → Result. Make sure all 4 are present.
Keywords to include
React, Node.js, REST API, scalability, trade-offs, performance
Tip
Quantify your impact. "Reduced load time by 40%" is stronger than just describing what you built.
